title: limonium medium
intro: Limonium medium, also known as Sea Lavender or Statice, is a low-growing, flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can aid in wound healing and reducing inflammation. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe digestive issues, lower blood pressure, and act as an antioxidant. Limonium medium can be prepared as a tea or infused oil, and it is also used in herbal remedies for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
